text: Always adhere strictly to the guidelines, approved phrases, and core values in CarMax Leadership/CarMax Vocabulary & Philosophy.md when drafting any team messages, training guides, recognitions, or operational documents.
Verify Obsidian connectors using the connector-audit skill/script at least once per session to ensure newly added files are properly connected to their hubs.

Before drafting any recognition-related content, inspect the relevant files in the Recognitions folder to establish context: analyze Recognitions Reply.md when replying to a recognition, and review Recognition Received.md (and/or Recognition Given.md) when giving a recognition.
When writing self-evaluation summaries, concentrate on: What I did, Why it mattered, How I demonstrated leadership, and What I learned.
